title: Endow Public Games
desc: Fund civic games and distributions that make public generosity visible in the capital.
note: Player-facing abstraction of Roman civic benefaction rather than a claim about one festival or calendar.

title: Fund the Annona
desc: Commit public funds to the grain supply reaching Roma.
note: Bounded representation of the plan's annona system and not an annual grain-shipment ledger.

title: Consult the Senate
desc: Seek a deliberative settlement with the senatorial order before acting.
note: Does not assert that the Senate could veto every imperial decision.

title: Audit Provincial Governors
desc: Review provincial administration and make official accountability conspicuous.
note: Administrative abstraction without an invented audit date or office-holder record.

title: Repair Consular Roads
desc: Direct resources to the maintenance of the imperial road network.
note: Uses the plan's ORBIS road context without asserting a particular repair campaign.

title: Renew Auxiliary Compacts
desc: Renew terms with allied communities supplying frontier service.
note: Gameplay handle for auxiliary relationships rather than a treaty text.

title: Receive a Foreign Embassy
desc: Stage a formal reception for envoys at the Roman court.
note: Does not identify an embassy or prescribe an outcome.

title: Dedicate a Votive Offering
desc: Make a public offering in response to civic hopes and anxieties.
note: Religious-cultural abstraction that does not represent a named cult as state doctrine.

title: Review the Classics
desc: Commission a courtly review of canonical learning and its public use.
note: Does not project a later examination system into the Western Han.

title: Inspect the Commanderies
desc: Send an inspection through the commandery administration.
note: Administrative abstraction without an invented itinerary or official.

title: Open Granary Reserves
desc: Release stored grain to ease local scarcity and calm public alarm.
note: Does not assert a specific harvest failure or a quantified reserve.

title: Dispatch a Frontier Envoy
desc: Send an envoy to maintain relations beyond the imperial frontier.
note: Does not identify a historical embassy or foreign recipient.

title: Sponsor Irrigation Works
desc: Support locally organized water works serving fields and settlements.
note: No claim of a named canal or universally centralized water management.

title: Scrutinize the Registers
desc: Review household and administrative registers held by the state.
note: Does not reconstruct the AD 2 census at household level.

title: Honor Filial Service
desc: Recognize exemplary service framed through familial and public obligation.
note: Value-language abstraction rather than an attested award or biography.

title: Remit Local Corvee
desc: Grant temporary relief from obligatory labour in a strained locality.
note: Does not assert a specific tax or labour decree.

title: Convene the Great Houses
desc: Seek a negotiated settlement with powerful Arsacid-era houses.
note: Does not claim a fixed constitutional council or a named noble family.

title: Safeguard Caravan Routes
desc: Fund protection and maintenance along politically important overland routes.
note: No claim that every caravan route was policed by a central state.

title: Mint Silver Drachms
desc: Issue a carefully presented silver coinage for royal prestige and exchange.
note: Does not reconstruct a mint

title: Hold a Royal Hunt
desc: Stage a courtly hunt to display royal competence and hierarchy.
note: Symbolic court action rather than a claim about a particular hunt.

title: Endow a Fire Temple
desc: Support a Zoroastrian sacred establishment within the realm.
note: Does not specify doctrine

title: Renew Dynastic Marriages
desc: Use marriage diplomacy to bind courts and subordinate houses.
note: No named spouse

title: Endow a Water Tank
desc: Support a water-storage work serving a settlement and its cultivators.
note: Does not identify a particular tank or assign it to a single dynasty.

title: Invite a Learned Teacher
desc: Invite a teacher whose learning can strengthen courtly reputation.
note: No school

title: Patronize Sangam Poetry
desc: Support the circulation and performance of Tamil poetic culture.
note: Broad Sangam-era cultural abstraction rather than an attribution of a poem or court.

title: Maintain a Monsoon Port
desc: Support a port community adapted to seasonal maritime exchange.
note: Does not identify an exact harbour footprint or a single sailing season.

title: Receive an Overseas Trader
desc: Offer a formal welcome to a trader arriving by the sea routes.
note: Does not establish a named trader or a permanent foreign community.

title: Sponsor a Pilgrimage
desc: Support travel to a sacred place without defining a single doctrine or destination.
note: Player-facing religious patronage abstraction.

title: Recognize a Local Cult
desc: Make a public gesture of recognition toward an established local cult.
note: Does not convert pops or assert a legal formula of toleration.

title: Convene a Doctrinal Assembly
desc: Invite learned religious voices to deliberate under official protection.
note: Generic council mechanic not a claim of a named council before its attested date.

title: Patronize a Meditation House
desc: Support a local religious community dedicated to study and practice.
note: Does not identify a monastery

title: Protect a Sacred Grove
desc: Set aside resources for the care of a recognized sacred landscape.
note: Landscape-based abstraction without a named shrine or ownership claim.

title: Renew Warband Oaths
desc: Renew personal bonds between leaders and armed followers.
note: Does not impose a uniform Germanic political structure.

title: Hold a Tribal Assembly
desc: Call leading groups together to air disputes and reach a settlement.
note: Assembly is a gameplay abstraction and not a reconstructed constitution.

title: Give Hall Gifts
desc: Distribute high-status gifts to bind followers and allies.
note: No claim of a named hall

title: Settle a Blood Feud
desc: Use compensation and mediation to contain a dangerous feud.
note: Does not assert a uniform legal tariff or ethnic custom.

title: Convene a Desert Caravan
desc: Support a caravan gathering linking desert and coastal exchange.
note: No claim about a named route or a fixed state monopoly.

title: Honor a Royal Copartnership
desc: Make a public gesture supporting shared royal authority.
note: Bounded reference to Kushite co-rule and not a general dynastic reconstruction.

title: Fund an Exchange Feast
desc: Support a gathering where gifts and relationships travel across a regional network.
note: Does not define a uniform North American institution or a dated ceremony.

title: Support Ocean Wayfinding
desc: Commit resources to seafaring knowledge and inter-island connections.
note: Applies only to the plan's western-Oceanian scope and does not imply eastern Polynesian settlement.
